features: ♬100% brand new,Lightweight, exquisite,fashionable lovely wedding favour boxes for wedding,bridal shower,anniversary,birthday,baby shower, theme party favour.
♬The classical bird wedding favor boxes is of versatile use,which can be filled with wedding almonds, sweets, chocolates and candies / Dove / kisses to make a surprise to your guests and friends.
♬Wedding favor boxes size:2”X2”X3” It can store 5-8 Alpenliebe candies, or 5-8 Dove chocolates.
♬50 PCS wedding guest gift With 50 Pcs trimmed ribbon.
♬Deliver from UK Amazon. You can receive your lovely wedding favors soon, no need anxious waiting.
description: Product Description Benbilry is a new and fast-growing brand that you can trust with your personal care routine, committing to offer a wide range of high quality beauty productions.You can create a great look and find confidences from your unique style with the help from Benbilry. Benbilry 50pcs Classical Bird Wedding Party Favor Box Perfect idea for wedding party decoration or other occation Fill each with candy,chocolates or any special goodies you would like to present to the guests. How many sweets I can put into the cute box? 10 Hershey Or 5-8 Alpenliebe candies 5-8 Dove chocolates Or 7 Hershey kisses and 2 Dove chocolates. Paper.Size: Approx.2"x2"x3".Ribbon length:40mm How to assemble the boxes? 1. Fold the four corners on the top along the crease, combine the folded edges. 2. Putting sweets into the box. 3. Make the ribbon through the opening hole on the top and tie them into a bow. Material: Laser cut Pearlescent Art Package: 50x Pearl paper hollow wedding candy boxes
